issue_summary: Add bypass option for classes to recursive and reflective EqualsBuilder
javadoc_before:
/** * Constructs a builder for the specified object. * *

If the style is {@code null}, the default style is used.

* *

If the buffer is {@code null}, a new one is created.

* * @param object the Object to build a {@code toString} for, not recommended to be null * @param style the style of the {@code toString} to create, null uses the default style * @param buffer the {@link StringBuffer} to populate, may be null */
entity_signature: public ToStringBuilder(final Object object, ToStringStyle style, StringBuffer buffer)
